description_long: This is a black open-face motorcycle helmet with a smooth, glossy finish and a prominent peak visor attached to the front. The helmet features a rounded dome shape, providing coverage for the top, sides, and back of the head, while leaving the face exposed. On the left side, there is a red and white oval 'BELL' brand logo, adding a distinct visual element. The lower front section includes a chin guard with ventilation slits, enhancing airflow and comfort for the wearer. The helmet appears to be constructed primarily from hard plastic or fiberglass, with a likely padded interior for impact absorption. No visible external vents or complex graphic designs are present, giving the helmet a classic, minimalist appearance.
description: A glossy black open-face helmet with a peak visor and a red 'BELL' logo on the side, featuring a simple, classic design and chin guard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open face, peak visor, and chin guard with ventilation slits.
description_view_1: Left-front angled view highlighting the 'BELL' logo and the curvature of the helmet.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, uninterrupted dome of the helmet.
description_view_3: Right-front angled view showing the peak visor and open face, without visible branding.
attribute_brand_logo: A red and white oval 'BELL' logo is visible on the left side of the helmet, featuring bold white text on a red background with a white border.
attribute_ventilation_pattern: The helmet has a set of horizontal slits on the chin guard for ventilation; no other vents are visible on the dome.
